levels.intendedModel:
# <--- This marks the start of a comment

# One ball is dropped into cell B3
B3 = 1

# The ball may go in two directions: A4 or C4
# The possibilities "split"
A4, C4 = split(B3)

# From A4 the ball ends up for sure in cell A5
A5 = A4

# Return the probability
return A5

# Writing code is not necessary
# for the easy tasks.
# But you can still learn from the model solutions!
# And the code may be useful later on...

# One ball is dropped into cell B3
B3 = 1

# First split:
A4, C4 = split(B3)

# Second split:
B5, D5 = split(C4)

# Return the probability
return D5

# One ball is dropped into cell C3
C3 = 1

# First split:
B4, D4 = split(C3)

# Jos pallo kulki vasemmalle, toinen jako ruudussa B5:
A5, C5v = split(B4)

# Jos pallo kulki oikealle, toinen jako ruudussa D5:
C5o, E5 = split(D4)

# Laske yhteen eri mahdollisuudet
C6 = C5v + C5o

# Palauta summa
return C6

# One ball is dropped into cell B3
B3 = 1

#Kolme jakoa putkeen:
A4, C4 = split(B3)
B5, D5 = split(C4)
C6, E6 = split(D5)

return E6

# One ball is dropped into cell D3
D3 = 1

# Three layers of splits!

# First layer:

C4, E4 = split(D3)

# Second layer:

# Left:
B5, D5v = split(C4)
# Right:
D5o, F5 = split(E4)
# Combine crossing possibilities in cell D5
D5 = D5v + D5o

# Third layer:

# Left:
A6, C6v = split(B5) # (does not affect the star cell)
# Center:
C6o, E6v = split(D5)
# Right:
E6o, G6 = split(F5)
# Combine crossing possibilities
C6 = C6v + C6o # (does not affect the star cell)
E6 = E6v + E6o

return E6

# One ball is dropped into cell E3
E3 = 1

# Four layers of splits!

# First layer:
D4, F4 = split(E3)

# Second layer:
C5, E5v = split(D4)
E5o, G5 = split(F4)
E5 = E5v + E5o

# Third layer:
B6, D6v = split(C5)
D6o, F6v = split(E5)
F6o, H6 = split(G5)
D6 = D6v + D6o
F6 = F6v + F6o

# Fourth layer
# Leave B6 and H6 aside (does not affect the star cell)
C7o, E7v = split(D6)
E7o, G7v = split(F6)
E7 = E7v + E7o

return E7

# One ball is dropped into cell C3
C3 = 1

# "Upper layer":

B4, D4 = split(C3)
C5o, E5 = split(D4)
D6o, F6 = split(E5)
E7o, G7 = split(F6)

# "Alakerros"

A5, C5v = split(B4)
C5 = C5v + C5o
B6, D6v = split(C5)
D6 = D6v + D6o
C7, E7v = split(D6)
E7 = E7v + E7o
D8, F8v = split(E7)

F8 = F8v + G7

return F8

# One ball is dropped into cell D3
D3 = 1

# First split
C4, E4 = split(D3)

# Left split
A5, C5 = split(C4)
A6 = A5
C6 = C5
# Right split
E5, G5 = split(E4)
E6 = E5

# But what do we do with the ball going to G5?
# Split it the same way!
# Continue as long as (while) the ball ends up in G5

while G5 == 1:
    D3 = G5  # Ball moves from G5 to D3
    C4, E4 = split(D3) # First split
    A5, C5 = split(C4) # Left split
    # Combine these possibilities with the old ones
    A6 += A5 # (same as A6 = A6 + A5)
    C6 += C5
    E5, G5 = split(E4) # Right split
    E6 += E5
    # The while-loop restarts if G5 = 1

return E6

# Track where the ball moves
C4 = 1
B5 = 0
A6 = 0
D5 = 0
E6 = 0

A8 = 0
E8 = 0

# Explore different options for the ball's
# location as long as
# the ball has not ended up in a box
while A8 + E8 == 0:
    # Handle the five possible
    # locations one by one
    B4, D4 = split(C4)
    B5 += B4
    D5 += D4
    A5, B6y = split(B5)
    A6 += A5
    D5 += B6y
    A7, B6v = split(A6)
    A8 += A7
    D5 += B6v
    C5, E5 = split(D5)
    C4 += C5
    E6 += E5
    D6, E7 = split(E6)
    D5 += D6
    E8 += E7
    # The loop runs as long as
    # the ball has not reached the goal

return E8

# This is a more complex level:
# there are two loops, and they are nested!
# One loop "starts" in cell D3, the other in cell E4
# The ball can switch from one loop to the other through cell D8!

# Idea: keep running the factory as long as
# the ball has not ended up in a box.
# This way we handle both loops together.


# Set up the loops. The ball starts in the D3 loop.
D3 = 1
E4 = 0

# Initialize the boxes to zero:
B6 = 0
F6 = 0


while B6 + F6 == 0: # Ball is not yet in a box
    # If the ball is in D3, then split in D4
    C4, E4v = split(D3)
    E4 += E4v

    # Then handle the split in E5
    D5o, F5 = split(E4)
    # Split in C5:
    B5, D5v = split(C4)

    # Handle the possibilities where the ball
    # ends up in a box:
    B6 += B5
    F6 += F5

    # Handle also the possibility that the
    # ball ends up in the loop again
    D5 = D5v + D5o
    C8, E8 = split(D5)
    D3 = C8
    E4 = E8

return B6

# One ball is dropped into cell F3
F3 = 1

# Writing it all out explicitly
# is becoming tedious.
# Therefore: a loop!

layer = [F3]

for k in range(5): # Repeat 5 times
    # Prepare the next layer...
    next_layer = []
    for i in range(len(layer) + 1):
        next_layer.append(0)

    #...go through the mixers of the current layer...
    for i in range(len(layer)):
        L, R = split(layer[i])
        next_layer[i] += L
        next_layer[i+1] += R

    #...new layer has been computed
    layer = next_layer

# The star cell is the fourth one, i.e. position 3 in the list
return layer[3]

B3 = 1

# We need a loop here!
# Initialize box ball counts to zero:

C4 = 0
A8 = 0

# Start the loop running:
while B3 == 1:
    # First split at A4
    B4, A5 = split(B3)
    # Second split at A6
    A7, B6 = split(A5)
    # Combine the possibilities with the existing ones:
    C4 += B4 # (same as C4 = C4 + B4)
    A8 += A7
    # The loop closes:
    B3 = B6
    # The loop restarts
    # if the ball ended up back in B3

return C4

D3 = 1

# A loop is needed again
# Initialize boxes to zero again:

B8 = 0
D8 = 0
F8 = 0

# Start the loop running:
while D3 == 1:
    # First split at D4 - three-way split!
    C4, D5, E4 = split(D3)
    # Split on the left:
    A6, B7, C6 = split(C4)
    # Split on the right:
    E6, F7, G6 = split(E4)
    # Count the possibilities ending in boxes:
    B8 += B7
    D8 += C6 + D5 + E6
    F8 += F7
    # The loop can restart from the left and right:
    D3 = A6 + G6

return D8

C3 = 1

B4, D4 = split(C3) # Top
A5, C5v = split(B4) # Left
C5o, E5 = split(D4) # Right

A6 = A5
C6 = C5v + C5o # Combine the two possibilities
E6 = E5

# Return a list of options like this:
return [A6, C6, E6]

D3 = 1

# First layer:
C4, E4 = split(D3)

# Second layer:
B5, D5v = split(C4)
D5o, F5 = split(E4)
D5 = D5v + D5o

# Kolmas kerros

A6, C6v = split(B5)
C6o, E6v = split(D5)
E6o, G6 = split(F5)
C6 = C6v + C6o
E6 = E6v + E6o

# Palauta
return [A6, C6, E6, G6]

# We use a loop

E3 = 1

# Idea: split the paths of the upper layer
# always into two possibilities.
# Combine crossing possibilities.

cur_layer = [E3]

for layer in range(4): # Repeat 4 times
    next_len = len(cur_layer) + 1

    # Initialize the next layer, ...
    next_layer = []
    for i in range(next_len):
        next_layer.append(0)

    #... then fill it in...
    for i in range(len(cur_layer)): # Go through each cell
        L, R = split(cur_layer[i]) # Split the cell
        next_layer[i] += L # Add to the left
        next_layer[i+1] += R # Add to the right

    #... and the current layer becomes the next one
    cur_layer = next_layer

return cur_layer

# Same as before, but now there is one more layer

F3 = 1

cur_layer = [F3]

for layer in range(5): # Repeat 5 times
    next_len = len(cur_layer) + 1

    # Initialize the next layer, ...
    next_layer = []
    for i in range(next_len):
        next_layer.append(0)

    #... then fill it in...
    for i in range(len(cur_layer)): # Go through each cell
        L, R = split(cur_layer[i]) # Split the cell
        next_layer[i] += L # Add to the left
        next_layer[i+1] += R # Add to the right

    #... and the current layer becomes the next one
    cur_layer = next_layer

return cur_layer

B3 = 1
# Puolitetaan toistuvasti
A5, C4 = split(B3)
B6, D5 = split(C4)
C7, E6 = split(D5)
D8, F7 = split(E6)
E9, G9 = split(F7)

return [A5, B6, C7, D8, E9, G9]

# One ball is dropped into cell C3
C3 = 1

# "Upper layer":

B4, D4 = split(C3)
C5o, E5 = split(D4)
D6o, F6 = split(E5)
E7o, G7 = split(F6)

# "Alakerros"

A5, C5v = split(B4)
C5 = C5v + C5o
B6, D6v = split(C5)
D6 = D6v + D6o
C7, E7v = split(D6)
E7 = E7v + E7o
D8, F8v = split(E7)

F8 = F8v + G7

return [A5, B6, C7, D8, F8]

E3 = 1

D5, H5 = split(E3)

# Vasen puoli
C6, E6 = split(D5)
B7, D7v = split(C6)
D7o, F7v = split(E6)
D7 = D7v + D7o
A8, C8v = split(B7)
C8o, E8v = split(D7)
C8 = C8v + C8o

# Oikea puoli
G6, I6 = split(H5)
F7o, H7v = split(G6)
H7o, J7 = split(I6)
H7 = H7v + H7o
G8o, I8v = split(H7)
I8o, K8 = split(J7)
I8 = I8v + I8o

# Keskiosa
F7 = F7v + F7o
E8o, G8v = split(F7)
E8 = E8v + E8o
G8 = G8v + G8o

return [A8, C8, E8, G8, I8, K8]

E3 = 1

A8 = 0
B8 = 0
C8 = 0
D8 = 0
E8 = 0


while E3 == 1:
    D4, E5, F4 = split(E3)
    A7, B7, C7 = split(D4)
    A8 += A7
    B8 += B7
    C8 += C7
    D7, E7, F7 = split(E5)
    D8 += D7
    E8 += E7
    E3 = F4 + F7

return [A8, B8, C8, D8, E8]

A5 = 0
C5 = 0

B3 = 1
A4, C4 = split(B3)
A5 += A4

B3 = 1
A4, C4 = split(B3)
A5 += A4

return A5

A5 = 0
C5 = 0

# A loop is handy here:

for i in range(3):
    B3 = 1
    A4, C4 = split(B3)
    A5 += A4

return A5

A5 = 0
C5 = 0

# We use a loop:

for i in range(5):
    B3 = 1
    A4, C4 = split(B3)
    A5 += A4

return A5

A5 = 0
C5 = 0

# Toistosilmukka toimii taas:

for i in range(10):
    B3 = 1
    A4, C4 = split(B3)
    A5 += A4

return A5

B6 = 0
D6 = 0

# Toistosilmukka toimii edelleen:

for i in range(25):
    C4 = 1
    B5, D5 = split(C4)
    B6 += B5

return B6

L1 = 0
L5 = 0

# ...ja edelleen:

for i in range(200):
    K3 = 1
    L2, L4 = split(K3)
    L5 += L4

return L5

G9 = 0

for i in range(32):
    B3 = 1
    A4, C4 = split(B3)
    B5, D5 = split(C4)
    C6, E6 = split(D5)
    D7, F7 = split(E6)
    E8, G8 = split(F7)
    G9 += G8

return G9

D6 = 0
C3 = 1
while C3 == 1:
    D4 = 1
    C5 = 1
    D6 += D4
    A4, A6 = split(C5)
    C3 = A4
return D6

B6 = 0

for i in range(4):
    B3 = 1
    A4, C4 = split(B3, 75%)
    A6 = A4*2
    C6 = C4*3
    B6 += A6 + C6

return B6

D7 = 0

for i in range(4):
    D3 = 1
    C4, E4 = split(D3)
    A5, C5 = split(C4)
    E5, G5 = split(E4)
    D6 = 2*C5 + E5
    D7 += D6

return D7

C7 = 0

C4 = 4
while C4 >= 1:
    C4yksi = 1
    B5, D5 = split(C4yksi)
    C4 -= 1
    A6, C6v = split(B5)
    C6o, E6 = split(D5)
    C7 += C6v + C6o
    C4 += 3*E6

return C7

G8 = 0
A3 = 4
D4 = 0
while A3 >= 1:
    A3 -= 1
    A4 = 1
    A6, B5 = split(A4)
    D4 += B5
    A3 += B5

while D4 >= 1:
    D4 -= 1
    D5 = 1
    D7, E6 = split(D5)
    D4 += E6
    G8 += E6

return G8

B6 = 0
B5 = 0

B2 = 4

A3 = 2
B4 = B2 - A3 # 2 flow into B4


A5_swap = 1
C5_swap = 1

while B4 >= 1:
    B4yksi = 1
    B4 -= 1
    A4, C4 = split(B4yksi, 75%)
    if A5_swap == 1:
        A5_swap -= A4
        B6 += A4
    else:
        B5 += A4
    if C5_swap == 1:
         C5_swap -= C4
         B6 += C4
    else:
         B5 += C4
return B6

C3 = 2
C4vaihto = 4
A4 = 0

while C3 >= 1:
    C3yksi = 1
    C3 -= 1
    if C4vaihto == 0:
        A4 += 1
        continue
    C4vaihto -= 1
    C6, D5 = split(C3yksi)
    C3 += 2*D5

return A4

E9 = 0
D8vaihto = 3
F8vaihto = 3

E2 = 4

while E2 >= 1:
    E3 = 1
    E2 -= 1
    D4, F4 = split(E3)
    B4 = D4*4
    H4 = F4*4
    while B4 >= 1:
        B5 = 1
        B4 -= 1
        A6, C6 = split(B5)
        B7, D7 = split(C6)
        if D8vaihto >= 1:
            E9 += D7
            D8vaihto -= D7
    while H4 >= 1:
        H5 = 1
        H4 -= 1
        G6, I6 = split(H5)
        F7, H7 = split(G6)
        if F8vaihto >= 1:
            E9 += F7
            F8vaihto -= F7

return E9

A7vaihto = 1
B6_swap = 1
D6vaihto = 1
E7vaihto = 1
G7vaihto = 1
H6vaihto = 1
J6vaihto = 1
K7vaihto = 1

F8 = 0

F2 = 8

while F2 >= 1:
    F3 = 1
    F2 -= 1
    E4, G4 = split(F3)
    B5, D5 = split(E4)
    H5, J5 = split(G4)
    A7, B6 = split(B5)
    D6, E7 = split(D5)
    G7, H6 = split(H5)
    J6, K7 = split(J5)
    if A7vaihto == 1:
         F8 += A7
         A7vaihto -= A7
    if B6_swap == 1:
         F8 += B6
         B6_swap -= B6
    if D6vaihto == 1:
         F8 += D6
         D6vaihto -= D6
    if E7vaihto == 1:
         F8 += E7
         E7vaihto -= E7
    if G7vaihto == 1:
         F8 += G7
         G7vaihto -= G7
    if H6vaihto == 1:
         F8 += H6
         H6vaihto -= H6
    if J6vaihto == 1:
         F8 += J6
         J6vaihto -= J6
    if K7vaihto == 1:
         F8 += K7
         K7vaihto -= K7

return F8

C9 = 0
B8vaihto = 7
D8vaihto = 7

maarat = [5, 4, 3, 2, 1]
for maara in maarat:
    C6 = maara
    B7, D7 = split(1)
    B7 *= C6
    D7 *= C6
    B9 = min(B7, B8vaihto)
    B8vaihto = max(B8vaihto - B7, 0)
    D9 = min(D7, D8vaihto)
    D8vaihto = max(D8vaihto - D7, 0)
    C9 += B9 + D9

return C9

E7 = 0
A3 = 4

while A3 >= 1:
    A4 = 1
    A3 -= 1
    A6, B5 = split(A4)
    A3 += B5
    D5 = B5
    C6, E6 = split(D5)
    E7 += E6

return E7
